items.title_cn: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
items.title_en: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
items.summary_cn: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.
items.summary_en: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.

items.title_cn: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
items.title_en: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
items.summary_cn: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.
items.summary_en: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.
